name: ntn-v2x-3gpp-architecture
description: NTN + V2X papers on architecture, 3GPP, NG-RAN, and core network
query: ("non-terrestrial network*" OR NTN OR "satellite-terrestrial network*" OR SAGIN OR "space-air-ground integrated network*") AND (V2X OR "C-V2X" OR "NR-V2X" OR "vehicular communication*" OR "vehicular network*" OR IoV OR "internet of vehicles") AND (architecture OR 3GPP OR "Release 17" OR "Release 18" OR "NG-RAN" OR RAN OR "core network")
exclusion: UAV OR UAS OR drone OR drones OR "unmanned aerial vehicle*" OR "urban air mobility" OR "low-altitude economy" OR "remote sensing" OR "earth observation" OR agriculture OR agricultural OR "precision agriculture" OR CubeSat OR CubeSats OR nanosatellite OR nanosatellites OR spacecraft OR "space debris" OR blockchain OR "machine learning"
